articles.title: Austria asks the EU to consider giving Anthropic a home in Europe
articles.excerpt: European government has, in writing, asked the European Union to find a way to host an American artificial-intelligence company. The request is unusual enough that the official making it conceded, in the same breath, that people would doubt it could be done. …

articles.title: Top South African police officer survives assassination attempt
articles.excerpt: Deputy crime intelligence boss Maj-Gen Feroz Khan was due to appear before an inquiry into police corruption this week.
articles.content:
One of South Africa's most senior police officers has survived an attempted assassination in Johannesburg, police say.

articles.title: Korean Stocks Rebound as Samsung, SK Hynix Unveil Spending Plan
articles.excerpt: South Korean stocks recouped earlier losses as Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. pledged massive investment during a government briefing that underscored the country’s commitment to AI development.
articles.content: South Korean stocks recouped earlier losses as Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. pledged massive investment during a government briefing that underscored the country’s commitment to AI development.
